## What does this PR add?

<!-- One sentence: what resource(s) are you adding, and to which section? -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Resource is EU-hosted, EU-compliant, or specifically EU-relevant
- [ ] Description is one line, in my own words (not copy-pasted)
- [ ] No compliance claims — description uses "resources for" / "helps with" language
- [ ] License/openness tag included (for datasets and models)
- [ ] Link resolves correctly (tested manually)
- [ ] I have read [CONTRIBUTING.md](CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] If I am the creator of this resource, I have noted that clearly in this PR
